title: Updating existing Items using a form
excerpt: Hi,  In our current workflow, we need to be able to update an existing item using a form.  Are there any workarounds or form integrations to accomplish this?

posts.author: Lisajames (Lisa)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, In our current workflow, we need to be able to update an existing item using a form. Are there any workarounds or form integrations to accomplish this?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Lisajames,

You can achieve what you are looking for using the Duplicates and Uniques app.
Here is a demo of how.
